long_description:
------ Created from incident source: INC10413571 ------
The below commands need to be run in DAL prod regional environment to jumppod

kubectl label snap -n 4c043e7af9773757d9bc534dd9842590 r006-30c22d7d-df52-41ae-a1a0-36caef8ccdcf "foo=bar"
kubectl label snap -n 7f75c7b025e54bc5635f754b2f888665 r006-0bbac6d7-0490-409a-95f9-c18dcfcea934 "foo=bar"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Current incident created by Baishali Mitra
